calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Prove-Up Hearing Application; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Teanna L. Ward, CSR#11918.

Lisa D. Dubowski, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, a Utah State Chartered Bank.
Walter Gibbs Custodian of Records for American Express sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Elizabeth Connors aka Connors E. Jennifer, aka Elizabeth J. Reed , and individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After testimony, evidence received, declaration of Tiffani Brow and exhibits attached to declaration and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages $31,468.50
Prejudgment interest at the annual rate of 10 % $6,482.24
Costs $487.50 Attorney Fees in the amount of $2,825.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $41,263.24
Judgment signed.
